Emergency Shutdown & Temperature Stabilization Protocol for Diesel Hydrotreater Reactor Feed Surge Drum (D-317) Document ID: SOP-DH-527-REV1 Facility: Area 300 – Diesel Hydrotreater & Hydrogen Recovery Unit (Western Process Complex) Effective Date: September 2, 2024 Compliance: OISD-STD-105, API 521, ISO 45001:2018, PESO Static Pressure Vessels Rules 2016 Purpose: Standard operating procedure covering emergency shutdown, stabilization, LOTO, emergency blowdown and RCA for Reactor Feed Surge Drum D-317. Equipment Specifications: - Primary Asset: D-317 – Reactor Feed Surge Drum - Associated Pump: P-317B – Reactor Feed Pump B - Normal Pressure: 36.8 bar - MAWP: 42.5 bar - Temperature: 345°C - High Temp Alarm: 355°C - High Pressure Trip: 40.8 bar - PSV Setpoint: 41.8 bar - Emergency Blowdown Valve: BDV-317 Emergency Shutdown Procedure: 1. Notify CCR, reduce feed, stop Pump P-317B and isolate FCV-317. 2. Purge with nitrogen at 1.5–2.5 barg for 5 minutes, vent to flare until oxygen is below 2% and hydrocarbons below 10% LEL. 3. Repeat purge twice and maintain a 0.3 barg nitrogen blanket. 4. Monitor pressure, shell temperature and hydrogen flow while limiting cooling to 30°C/hour. LOTO Procedure: - Lock electrical isolator for Pump P-317B. - Close D-317-IN-05 and apply lock/tag. - Close D-317-OUT-06 and apply lock/tag. - Drain, vent and verify zero pressure before maintenance. Root Cause Analysis: Incident ID: INC-2024-143 Event Date: August 19, 2024 Failure Summary: Excessive pump vibration resulted in an automatic trip and transient pressure rise within D-317. Root Cause: Partial blockage of lubricating oil filter LO-317 reduced bearing lubrication, causing overheating and vibration. CAPA: Replace bearings and filter, flush lubrication circuit, install online oil particle counter, implement DCS trend analytics, shorten oil analysis intervals and enhance predictive maintenance.

graph_nodes.label: Primary Asset: D317 – Reactor Feed Surge Drum
Compliance: OISDSTD105, API 521, ISO 45001:2018, PESO Static Pressure Vessels Rules 2016
Compliance: OISDSTD105, API 521, ISO 45001:2018, PESO Static Pressure Vessels Rules 2016
Associated Pump: P317B – Reactor Feed Pump B
1. Notify CCR, reduce feed, stop Pump P317B and isolate FCV317.

work_orders.title: Vibration Analysis & Bearing Regreasing
work_orders.desc: Elevated drive-end bearing vibration (7.8 mm/s). Requires diagnostic check.

work_orders.title: Replace Mechanical Seal Impeller A
work_orders.desc: Preventative maintenance window following 4,000 runtime hours.

work_orders.title: Pressure Relief Valve Calibration
work_orders.desc: Annual statutory compliance check required before Q3 audit.

incidents.title: FCC Regenerator Catalyst Carryover
incidents.root_cause: Cyclone dipleg pluggage due to thermal shock.
incidents.mitigation: Installed continuous acoustic DP sensor monitoring on diplegs.

incidents.title: Boiler Feed Pump Mechanical Failure
incidents.root_cause: Lube oil contamination with cooling water.
incidents.mitigation: Upgraded lip seals to magnetic face bearing isolators.

compliance_rules.title: Fire Protection Systems for Refineries
compliance_rules.desc: Mandatory 100% deluge coverage on hydrocarbon charge pumps.

compliance_rules.title: Management of Change (MOC) Audit
compliance_rules.desc: MOC #402 missing final risk assessment signoff.
